title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Anarock Property Consultants

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Anarock Property Consultants
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Anarock Property Consultants in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Anarock Property Consultants:
Anarock Property Consultants is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anarock Property Consultants!
